title: Canonical Telemetry
summary: Normalized telemetry schema for multi-provider ingestion.

blocks.heading: Why canonical telemetry
blocks.content: DeltaCore sits above multiple providers. All inbound telemetry must be normalized into a canonical schema before analytics or alerting.

blocks.heading: Telemetry rules
bullets: Define accepted units and standard conversion rules
Track missing data, delayed records and duplicates
Maintain raw-provider references for auditability and replay
Idempotent ingestion using provider event IDs or hashes
